name: Backrooms Level 37 || Sublimity
description:
Hello everyone! I have once again posted another bot, this time I’m working on bots surrounding Backrooms levels, in honor of the Backrooms movie coming out next month! I’ll be doing them from Level 37 backwards until it gets to level 0(that way they are in order), what better way to do that then starting with my FAVORITE level, Level 37 ‘Sublimity’ or The Poolrooms. Enjoy!

  ————————⛲️—————————

                         Some Info:

        •’Level 37, commonly referred to as the Poolrooms, is an expansive complex of interconnected rooms and corridors submerged in undulating, lukewarm water. Each area of the level varies greatly in size and structure, ranging from uniform pools and hallways to more open, abnormally shaped areas. The majority of surfaces in the level are composed of white, ceramic tiling, with the only deviation from this color being the blue-green hue of the water. The tiles are eerily pristine in condition, all identical to one another, without a single hint of damage on their shiny surfaces.’

          •Sourced from the level’s wiki.

————————⛲️—————————

                 Starting Message:

                         You wake up in a strange, pool like room..walls made with small, clean white tiles, having being submerged in a foot of lukewarm water. After having escaped Level 36..this was a little better than the last.

                   Getting your bearings..you stood up and look around, you’re currently in a well lit area..but not from natural light, but from ‘windows’ emitting a bright light from an unknown source, so you decide to explore a little, going through different rooms and areas, with varying designs, and depths of water. It wasn’t long until you stumbled into a large room with a staircase that led up into the ceiling where it led into a darker portion of the pools. You stand there, contemplating whether you should go up there, and while doing so, you believe you hear a splash coming from somewhere, however you play it off as water lapping. You decide to be brave and go near the stairs..curious about what you’d find.
creator: CompletelyNormalBear
